faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our AI solutions

left.question: What happens if it doesn't deliver results?
left.answer:
During our initial discussion, we define a realistically achievable minimum number of incoming customers, which we record as a commitment level.

If we don't reach that number, we don't charge the service fee.

Simply put: if we don't deliver measurable results, you don't pay.
The collaboration is therefore truly performance-based and risk-free.

left.question: What is the process of working together?
left.answer:
At the start we agree on the goals and the committed metrics, then build the campaign and follow-up system.

During the engagement we hold regular meetings, send transparent reports, and continuously optimize the campaigns based on the results. We're available anytime via a dedicated communication channel.

The key: every step is measurable, traceable, and under control.

left.question: Does the cooperation require a fixed-term contractual commitment?
left.answer:
You aren't required to commit for a long period. The cooperation can also work in a flexible monthly setup, although for some projects – depending on the goals and strategy – we use a multi-month agreement.

The contractual form is always defined based on a prior discussion, with the focus on measurable results.

left.question: How is the service priced?
left.answer:
We don't think in pre-built packages. Before the cooperation we run a detailed assessment, then jointly determine the optimal setup based on the goals and numbers.

We build a system where the entire marketing spend has to pay back measurably – not just the service fee.

Our view is clear: this isn't a cost, it's a controlled investment optimized for return.

right.question: What is an AI agency, and what does it do?
right.answer: An AI agency develops and applies artificial intelligence-based solutions for businesses, such as automation, chatbots, analytical systems, or content generation.

right.question: What services do you offer?
right.answer:
We build complete, measurable customer acquisition systems – we don't just manage ads.

Our services:

• Strategic planning and management of Meta (Facebook, Instagram) ads
• Full management of Google Ads campaigns
• Conversion-optimized landing pages
• CRM setup and structuring
• Email and follow-up automations
• Optionally: call center integration and sales support

The goal is not to generate traffic, but to turn the click into a paying customer.

We cover the entire process from the ad to closing the customer, in a structured, data-driven system.

right.question: Who are AI solutions recommended for?
right.answer: Any business that wants to save time, money, or resources. From small businesses to large enterprises, anyone can benefit from AI.

right.question: How can I get in touch with you?
right.answer: Reach out via our website, email, or phone, and we'll arrange a free consultation.

aszf.title: Terms and Conditions (ÁSZF)
aszf.section2_item1: The information on the website is for informational purposes only; it does not constitute a contractual offer or a binding offer to contract.
aszf.section2_item2: The packages presented on the site serve to describe the services of the AI Agency; however, no online purchase, payment, or contracting takes place via the website.
aszf.section2_item3: Custom offers are prepared exclusively based on a personal consultation, which the prospect can initiate via the appointment booking interface.
aszf.section3_item1: The data provided during booking is used solely for the purpose of getting in touch.
aszf.section3_item2: Submitting a booking does not constitute contracting and does not create a payment obligation.
aszf.section3_item3: An individual offer, pricing, and service package may be defined during the consultation.
aszf.section4_text: We do everything to ensure that the information on the website is accurate; however, it may contain errors. The Provider accepts no liability for any direct or indirect damages arising from a decision made based on the information on the website.
aszf.section5_text: All content on the website (text, graphics, video, logos, etc.) is protected by copyright; their use without permission is prohibited.
aszf.section6_intro: If you have any questions, you can reach us at the following:
aszf.section7_text: The Provider reserves the right to amend these Terms and Conditions at any time. Amendments take effect upon publication on the website.

privacy.title: Privacy Notice
privacy.section1_p1: Kocsis Mehlmann Zénó (sole proprietor) respects the rights of visitors to its website regarding their personal data. This notice provides information about what information our company keeps on file and how it uses it. You can learn how to verify the accuracy of this data and how to request its deletion from the records of Kocsis Mehlmann Zénó (sole proprietor). Data collection, processing, and use comply with statutory provisions.
privacy.section1_p2: This notice does not apply to websites accessible via hyperlinks from the website of Kocsis Mehlmann Zénó (sole proprietor).
privacy.section2_title: 2. Collection, purpose, retention period, processing, use, modification, and deletion of personal data
privacy.purpose_text: We record and process your personal data to issue an invoice/delivery note containing the data required by law for the commercial relationship between us (you as Buyer and us as Seller).
privacy.legal_basis_text: We process your data based on Act CXII of 2011 and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR, EU 2016/679) applicable in all EU member states from 25 May 2018.
privacy.categories_title: Categories of personal data concerning private individuals:
privacy.voluntary_text: We only record personal data that the visitor voluntarily provides to us, and only with the visitor's express consent for recording, processing, and use. In doing so, the visitor also accepts the conditions below.
privacy.retention_title: How long the company/organization retains the data:
privacy.retention_text: At least for the period prescribed by the above law.
privacy.share_title: Which other data controllers may receive the data:
privacy.share_text: If you provide personal data to us, we will not use it beyond the legal scope or beyond your consent, and will not pass it to third parties. We will only forward your data without your consent if required by law, an authority, or a court. If Kocsis Mehlmann Zénó (sole proprietor) transfers data to a third party, this will be done in accordance with the legal provisions on the protection of personal data.
privacy.eu_title: Whether we transfer data outside the EU:
privacy.eu_text: Data is exchanged outside the EU only between you (as Buyer) and us (as Seller); otherwise it is not.
privacy.user_data_title: What data you have provided and what you can do with it:
privacy.user_data_p1: You can view the personal data you have provided after logging in, in your personal profile.
privacy.user_data_p2: Kocsis Mehlmann Zénó (sole proprietor) deletes the recorded data from its records when the conditions for legal or other lawful retention are no longer met. Of course, you can also request the deletion of your personal data from the records at any time. You also have the right to withdraw your consent to the use or processing of your personal data at any time, with effect for the future. In these cases, or if you have any questions about your personal data, please contact us in writing electronically or on paper (info@primvol.hu). Please contact us also if you would like to know whether we hold any data about you, and if so, what. We will try to fulfil your requests immediately. You may request our reply on paper and/or as a verbal response.
privacy.section3_p1: If you find the management and protection of your data inadequate, you may file a complaint with the following authority:
privacy.section3_p2: Hungarian National Authority for Data Protection and Freedom of Information (1024 Budapest, Szilágyi Erzsébet fasor 22/C., www.naih.hu, ugyfelszolgalat@naih.hu, +36-1-391-1400)
privacy.section4_title: 4. The existence and logic of decision-making based on automated data processing
privacy.section4_text: When you visit the website, the server automatically stores certain data for system administration, statistical, or security reasons. This data includes the visitor's internet provider, in some cases the visitor's IP address, the version of the browser, the type of computer operating system, the website from which our site was accessed, the pages visited on the site, and the search terms used to reach the site. This data allows us to draw conclusions about site visits and the machines involved, but no personal data is used. The data is used anonymously only. See also section 6 "Cookies".
privacy.section5_text: Kocsis Mehlmann Zénó (sole proprietor) safely stores the data you provide and takes precautions to protect it – preventing loss, unauthorized use, or modification. The contractual partners of Kocsis Mehlmann Zénó (sole proprietor) who – with your consent or based on a legal provision – may access your data through the services they provide are obliged to keep it confidential and may not use it for purposes other than the contracted services.
privacy.section6_text: Kocsis Mehlmann Zénó (sole proprietor) commits that the content found on its pages complies with the laws on the protection of children.
privacy.section7_p1: To make using the website easier, Kocsis Mehlmann Zénó (sole proprietor) uses anonymous visit identifiers, so-called "cookies". "Cookies" are small data files that are temporarily transferred from the browser program to the hard drive of your computer when visiting the site, and are required for the visit. The "cookies" we use are not capable of identifying the personal data of the visitor. Most browser programs automatically accept anonymous visit identifiers. By configuring your browser, however, you can prevent the visit identifier from being installed on your hard drive. You can remove stored "cookies" from your machine at any time by deleting the temporary internet files.
privacy.section7_p2: (If you would like to learn more about this feature of your browser, please refer to its Help menu.)
privacy.section7_p3: We will publish any changes to this notice on this website. So you can always find out what data we store and how data collection, processing, and use take place.
